# ng-animated-icons mini reference

Compact context file for AI/tooling.

## Package
- Name: `ng-animated-icons`
- Framework: Angular standalone components (signals-first)
- Peer dependency: `@angular/core` `^19.0.0 || ^20.0.0 || ^21.0.0`
- Homepage: `https://icons.ajitpanigrahi.com/`
- Repo: `https://github.com/ajitzero/animated-icons`

## Install
- `npm i ng-animated-icons`
- `pnpm i ng-animated-icons`
- `yarn add ng-animated-icons`
- `bun add ng-animated-icons`

## Import + usage
- Import: `import { ActivityIcon, StarIcon } from 'ng-animated-icons';`
- Selectors: `<i-activity />`, `<i-star />`
- Naming: PascalCase import names with `Icon` suffix; selectors are `i-` + lowercase kebab-case.

## Inputs
- `color: string` (default `currentColor`)
- `size: number` (default `24`)
- `strokeWidth: number` (default `2`)
- `class: string` (optional)
- `animate: boolean` (default `false`)

## Global defaults
- `provideAnimatedIcons({ color, size, strokeWidth })`

## Notes / pitfalls
- Prefer immutable state updates when changing icon options.
- Bind `animate` to explicit hover/focus/touch state for controlled behavior.
- Keep ARIA/text labels for interactive icon-only controls.
- If template type errors appear around signal inputs (Angular internals brand fields), ensure only one `@angular/core` identity is present in the app and avoid consuming raw library source via TS path alias.

## Dev commands
- Docs dev: `bunx nx serve docs`
- Docs build: `bunx nx build docs`
- Library build: `bunx nx build ng-animated-icons`

## Full catalog
- Full alphabetical icon import list is in `llms.txt`.
- Current source-export count in this repo: `507` icons.
